AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_1.english: Then we'll start the first Horde emergency meeting.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_2.korean: 역시 칸 대장도 뜨거운 액션에 끌린 게 틀림없다니까?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_2.english: No doubt Captain Khan was drawn to the hot action, right?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_3.korean: 라고 하기에는 칸 대장의 평소 전투 방식에 비하면 저건 느리고 시시하잖아?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_3.english: But compared to Captain Khan's usual fighting style, that was slow and lame, wasn't it?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_4.english: Then maybe it's the story side?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_5.korean: 음… 칸 대장님의 반응을 생각하면 그건 아닐 거예요.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_5.english: Hmm… considering Captain Khan's reaction, probably not.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_6.korean: 칸 대장도 분명 화려한 폭발에 감명을 받는 걸 거야!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_6.english: Captain Khan must be impressed by the flashy explosion too!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_7.korean: 후아암~ 나 아직 할 일이 남았는데 말이지…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_7.english: Yawn… I still have things to do…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_8.english: This is a serious matter, so focus up.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_12.english: Even if you ask me what I think…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_13.english: What’s this emergency meeting even about, anyway?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_14.english: You heard it next to me yesterday, didn’t you?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_15.korean: 칸 대장이 영화를 보고 '멋지다'면서 '자기도 저런 걸 해봤으면 좋겠다'고 말한거.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_15.english: Captain Khan watched the movie, said “Cool,” and added that he wishes he could do something like that too.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_17.korean: 저도 의외라고 생각하긴 했지만, 이렇게까지 모두가 모일 일인가요?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_17.english: I thought it was unexpected too, but does it really warrant everyone gathering?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_18.korean: 너도 이제 여기에 오래 있었으니까 잘 알 거 아니야?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_18.english: You've been here a long time now, so you should know, right?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_19.korean: 우리 대장이 얼마나 욕심이 없는 사람인지.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_20.korean: 음… 확실히… 칸 대장님이 지금까지 뭔가 가지고 싶다던가, 하고 싶다는 말을 꺼낸 기억이 없네요.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_20.english: Hmm… indeed… I can’t recall Captain Khan ever saying he wanted anything or wanted to try something until now.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_21.korean: 그런데 그런 대장님이 처음으로 직접 해보고 싶다는 말을 꺼냈어요!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_21.english: But for the first time, the Captain actually said he wants to try it himself!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_22.korean: 이건 호드에서… 아니 오르카 전체의 중대 사항이라고요!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_22.english: This is a major issue for the Horde… no, for all of Orca!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_24.korean: 그렇다면 우리 호드가 해야 할 일은 하나뿐…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_24.english: Then there’s only one thing our Horde has to do…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_26.korean: 나는 좋아! 이거 재밌을 거 같은데!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_26.english: I’m all for it! This looks fun!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_27.korean: 칸 대장이 원하는 게 뭔지 정말 궁금한걸?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_27.english: I’m really curious what Captain Khan wants.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_29.korean: 나는 그렇게까지 흥미가 있는 건 아니지만… 어쩔 수 없나…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_29.english: I'm not that interested, but… I guess it can’t be helped…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_30.korean:
평소에 칸 대장에게는 신세를 많이 졌으니까.
가끔은 이런 것도 나쁘지 않겠지.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_30.english: I owe Captain Khan a lot, so something like this isn’t a bad idea once in a while.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_33.korean: 좋아요. 저도 칸 대장님을 위해서라면 뭔가 해드리고 싶어요!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_33.english: Fine. If it’s for Captain Khan, I’d like to do something too!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_35.korean: 우리 모두 힘을 합쳐서, 칸 대장님이 바라시는 걸 꼭 찾아내 이뤄드리는 거예요!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_35.english: Let’s all combine our strength and make sure we find and fulfill whatever Captain Khan desires!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_38.english: Ugh…! He’s right on my heels!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_40.english: Hold on tight! We’ll push through like this!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_44.korean: 미션이 끝난 후 보는 야경은 정말 아름답네…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_44.english: The night view after the mission is really beautiful…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_46.korean: 나는 옆에 있는 네가 더 예쁜 거 같은데?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_46.english: I think you, right beside me, are even prettier.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_47.english: Looks like you took a hard hit to the head…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_49.english: Hehe… still… I don’t hate it…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_50.english: It’s a movie worth watching again.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_51.korean: 멸망 전 인기가 많았던 영화라는데 이해가 가요.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_51.english: I get why—it was a hit before the world fell apart.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_52.korean: 음… 그런데 칸 대장님은 이 마지막 하이라이트 장면의 어디를 보고 멋지다고 한 걸까요?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_52.english: Hmm… but which part of this final highlight did Captain Khan think was cool?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_55.english: I think I’ve got it too!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_56.korean: 관심 없는 척하셔봤자 대장님도 결국은 여자이니까.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_56.english: Even if you act like you don’t care, you’re still a woman, Captain.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_57.korean:
당연히 질주하는 스포츠 카지!
멋진 남자지 않겠어?
예술적인 폭발 액션이야!
화려한 드레스겠지.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_57.english: Of course it’s a roaring sports car! Wouldn’t that make a handsome guy? It’s an explosively artistic action! And it must be a dazzling dress.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_59.korean: 아니, 아니 신속의 칸이잖아? 질주 본능에 따라 스포츠 카라니까?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_59.english: No, no—Khan’s the swift one, right? It’s a sports car that follows his racing instinct.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_60.korean: 당연히 멋진 남자와의 알콩달콩 로맨스 아니야?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_60.english: Obviously it’s a sweet romance with a handsome man, right?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_61.korean: 예술적인 폭발로 적들을 박살 내는 액션이 제일 멋지지 않아?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_61.english: Isn’t the coolest action the one where you blast enemies with artistic explosions?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_62.korean: 이목을 한몸에 받는 화려한 파티 드레스를 입어 보고 싶은 게 당연하잖아.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_62.english: It’s only natural to want to try on a glamorous party dress that steals the spotlight.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_66.korean: 음… 확신할 수 없지만, 지금 나온 것들 중에서는 칸 대장님의 취향이 없는 것 같아요.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_66.english: Hmm… I’m not certain, but none of these seem to match Captain Khan’s taste.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_68.korean: 그럼 페더, 너는 칸 대장이 원하는 게 뭔지 알겠어?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_68.english: So, Feather, do you know what Captain Khan wants?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_71.korean: 칸 대장님이 이렇게 직접적으로 원하는 걸 표현한 적이 없으시다 보니…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_71.english: Since Khan has never expressed his wishes that directly…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_72.english: Ah, of course! It’s an exception only for you, Commander!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_73.korean: 칸 대장님을 누구보다 잘 아는 네가 그렇게 말하면, 여기선 아무도 모르는 거나 다름없는 거야.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_73.english: If you, who know Khan better than anyone, say that, it’s basically saying no one here knows.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_74.english: Hmm… I see… What should we do?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_76.korean: 이렇게 된 이상 전부 해보는 건 어때요?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_76.english: Now that we’re here, why not try them all?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_79.korean: 예상과 다르게 저 중에 맞는 게 있을 수도 있잖아요.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_79.english: Who knows—maybe one of these will actually fit.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_80.korean: 그리고 무엇보다 저희들이 칸 대장님을 위해 무언가 해드린다는 게 중요한 게 아닐까요?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_80.english: And more importantly, isn’t the point that we’re doing something for Captain Khan?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_82.korean: 그래, 대장이 뭘 원하든 뭐가 중요하겠어 우리가 다 같이 뭔갈 해줬다는 게 중요하지!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_82.english: Yeah, whatever the boss wants, what matters is that we all did something together!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_83.english: Great, then let’s get started right away.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_84.korean: 하아… 알고 있었지만 결국 이렇게 되는 건가…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_84.english: Haa… I knew this would happen, but it still ends up like this…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_85.english: Kya ha! This is going to be fun!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_86.korean: 그럼, 당분간 칸 대장에게 들키지 않도록 모두 조심해.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_86.english: Then, for now, make sure we don’t get caught by Captain Khan.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_90.korean: 차나, 드레스 같은 건 어떻게 준비한다고 해도.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_90.english: Whether it’s a car or a dress, no matter how you prepare…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_91.english: How do you get a cool guy ready?
